title: cicendia quadrangularis
intro: Cicendia quadrangularis, also known as the four-angled gentian or four-angled gentian flower, is a type of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Cicendia quadrangularis is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its herbal preparations are commonly used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
